PathOfBuilding.Notes:
^5Gearing^7
- If you do not have enough chaos resistance, use chaos resistance Light of Meaning - If needed, fix stats on rare jewels, especially on Hybrid version and before Forbiddens - Start league with pconc, find some guide for it. Transition after you alt spam some low tolerance clusters - If you are on budget just annoint Whispers of Doom instead of using Impossible Escape
^7^5Bloodline Ascendancies^7 You can drop Nature's Reprisal and drop some damage and then do: - That Didn't Happen if you are on budget and do not have any sublime setup or forbiddens for a lot of defense (just replace timeless jewel with this, it acts like pseudo Corrupted Soul too) - Otherworldly Appendages - For defense while keeping Timeless Jewel/sublimes
^5Variations^7
^2Hybrid^7 - Cheapest, you can play this as soon as you get 3 or 4 medium clusters. Use Taste of Hate before Progenesis for defenses - Cannot run no regen mods unless you swap some flask to mana flask - Reduced defenses from altars hurt but manageable - Can be upgraded to Sublime Ice setup by dropping Flesh & Stone, grabbing Purity of Ice, Watchers for 20% fire/light as cold, Taste of Hate for 50% fire/light as cold, Sublime Ice for 30% fire/light as cold. Taste of hate only converts hits so make sure to stay above 0% fire/lightning res anyway. Then grab missing max cold res till 90% on rare jewels/chest, depends on what you have
^4Sublime Lightning^7 - Good for ignoring majority of map modifiers while not being as ungodly expensive as Sublime Fire versions - Technically not as tanky as hybrid version can be on paper but because of Divine Flesh it can actually handle hard map mods easier
^1Sublime Fire^7 - The overly expensive version, build is more than fine without sublime fire, but sublime fire is super nice regardless and allows you to tank pretty much anything - Best phys and dot mitigation out of all variations
^6Whispers^7 - Mana stacking version with Whipers of Infinity - Eldritch Inspiration is important, stacks that + low tolerance and some mana on gear - CI sucks, hybrid is tankier, dont go CI - Helical is expensive and painful to make so good luck, took me a while. Can use Shavronnes ring instead on budget - Do not needs to be sublime fire, can also be sublime ice (see Hybrid). This version is just hybrid setup in the end anyway just with mana and whispers on top
^2Crafting^7
Will add more stuff here when I will be more bored, so far here:
^4Helmet^7 (Lightning) - Hunter Blizzard Crown - Spam reforge chaos to get -chaos res and some other hunter mod - Elevate -chaos res - Buy random +2 max lightning res helmet - Woke orb together (can use beastlocks for getting better suffix) - Suffixes cant be changed + reforge lightning until brick or hit phys taken as lightning (can use augs to avoid brick but more expensive)
^4Ring^7 (Vermillion) - Start with dot multi fractured vermillion (do it yourself because RF players do not know how to craft items so the bases are overpriced) - Spam Deafening Essence of Torment until t1 life and open prefix (try annul) - Prefixes cannot be changed + veiled chaos for hybrid flat (can brick possibly, just redo) - Prefixes cannot be changed + reforge chaos until t1 chaos (can brick, can use aug to avoid brick but more expensive)
